summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DIGIACTIVA.COM premium Spanish landing page updates. All new features successfully implemented and functional: contact form with database integration, office address display, new tech/startup images, updated pricing plans, and advertising section.
passed_tests: Contact form submission with all required fields (nombre, email, telefono, mensaje, servicio_interes)
Contact form success message displaying correctly after submission
Leads successfully saved to database via POST /api/leads endpoint
Office address 'Merced 838-A, Oficina 117, Santiago' displayed in contact section
Footer contains complete contact information (address, WhatsApp +56 9 5110 7102, email contacto@digiactiva.com)
Navigation link to 'Contacto' section working on desktop and mobile
New tech/startup images properly implemented in Digital Solutions and Advisory sections
Digital Solutions section: Business dashboard analytics image with proper alt text
Advisory section: Startup team working in modern office image with proper alt text
Pricing plans correctly show 'No incluye patente municipal' and other exclusions
Advertising plans section with correct pricing: Básica $89k, Gestión $109k, Avanzada $149k
All 24 WhatsApp CTAs linking correctly to https://wa.me/56951107102
Mobile responsiveness excellent - contact form fully accessible on mobile
Mobile menu with Contacto navigation working correctly
Backend API validation working (rejecting invalid form data)
CORS headers properly configured for cross-origin requests
All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
